Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}You thought about what I said, didn't you? I can see it in your face.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I understand what you meant now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}There are four lit flames... Then the victors of this battle will be awarded the true key.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}So, Aigis... Have you decided which choice you would make?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 0 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I can't go back to the past yet. So I won't give up this key.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I see... Then it appears we are in opposition.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 3 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I won't give up on what's important to me. It may be painful... But I will stand by my choice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 1 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I understand now thanks to her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You know... All of this may've actually been for the best.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}You've been acting so empty and mechanical lately, like when we first met.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I actually thought you were just gonna hand over your key 'cause you didn't want to fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}But what you just said... It's like you're alive again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Which means we'll both be giving it our all, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 2 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I feel just as strongly about him as everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}All right, then... Guess we're done talking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 8 25 25}And I'm not giving up on what's important to me either![n]{f 1 1}
